title: 5★ Rating on CodeChef
description: Achieved 5-star rating on CodeChef — India top 1000, top 0.5 percentage in India. Global Rank 24 in CodeChef Starters 100.

title: ICPC Regionals Qualification
description: Qualified for ICPC Regionals, ranked under top 130. Secured rank under top 100 in Google Kickstart. Received highest placement of 25 LPA.

title: Smart India Hackathon Winner
student: Aaditya Barve, Mayur Ghodekar, Pradyumna Gayake
description: Won the Smart India Hackathon 2022 held at IIT Dhanbad.

title: International Internship — UK & USA
description: Cracked International Internship at NodeShark Hexfork Ltd, UK. Got internship at Carbyne as Data Analyst Intern in USA. Selected for Persistent Martian Summer Internship.

title: Amazon SDE Internship
description: Secured SDE Internship opportunity at Amazon, inspiring fellow girl students.

title: AIR 10 in Robocon
description: All India Rank 10 in Robocon 2022 national robotics competition.

title: WSI Medallion of Excellence
description: Won Medallion of Excellence at WorldSkills International 2019, Kazan Russia. Received ₹2,00,000 each from Government of India.

title: WS Asia 2018 — 1st Rank
description: Won 1st Rank at WS Asia 2018 Abu Dhabi in Mobile Robotics, representing India.

title: India Skill National Winner
description: Won India Skill 2018 National Competition in Mobile Robotics at Aero City, New Delhi. Prize of ₹1,00,000 each.

title: Best Stop Motion Animation — Firodiya
description: Award for Best Papercut Stop Motion Animation in Firodiya Karandak 2020 for play 'Sidestand'. Nomination for Best Actor.

title: Firodiya Karandak — Innovation Award
description: Best Stop Motion Animation award for play 'Manzar'. Appreciated as new concept in history of Firodiya Karandak.

title: 1st Prize Crane-o-Mania IIT Bombay
description: Won 1st Prize in Crane-o-Mania event at TechFest IIT Bombay.

title: Software Engineer Intern — University of Zurich
description: Got selected as Software Engineer Intern at University of Zurich, Switzerland. Became Candidate Master on Codeforces.

title: Placement at ZS Associates — 13.65 LPA
description: Got placed at ZS Associates with package of 13.65 LPA.
